templates.description: Money sent to MTN or Telecel number — dest_network in message body
templates.example: 0000012289051596 Confirmed. GHS33.50 sent to 0594372553 - ISAAC AKANCHALA on MTN MOBILE MONEY on 2026-03-07 at 09:52:16. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS259.18. You were charged GHS0.00. Your E-levy charge is GHS0.00. Sending money from Telecel Cash to Telecel Cash remains FREE on the Telecel Play App. Download the App https://bit.ly/TelecelPlayGhana and continue to enjoy the convenience. Reference: 1. Sendi k3k3!
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) sent to (?P<counterparty_phone>[\d]+) - (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Za-z][A-Za-z\s]+?) on (?P<dest_network>MTN MOBILE MONEY|TELECEL CASH) on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\. You were charged GHS(?P<fee>[\d.]+)\. Your E-levy charge is GHS(?P<e_levy>[\d.]+)\..*?Reference:\s*(?P<reference>.*?)\.\s*Sendi k3k3!
templates.notes: Some messages end with 'Do more with Telecel Cash!' instead of app promo — pattern handles both via .*? before Reference

templates.description: Inbound transfer from MTN MoMo — reference contains sender phone + name
templates.example: 0000012280187846 Confirmed. You have received GHS252.00 from MTN MOBILE MONEY with transaction reference: Transfer From: 233240590913-CECILIA OWUSU on 2026-03-05 at 15:04:34. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS293.68. Ref: support money
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. You have received GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) from MTN MOBILE MONEY with transaction reference: Transfer From: (?P<counterparty_phone>[\d]+)-(?P<counterparty_name>[A-Z][A-Z\s]+?) on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\. Ref:\s*(?P<reference>.+)

templates.description: Inbound transfer from another Telecel Cash user — no sender phone in message
templates.example: 0000014271426460 Confirmed. You have received GHS68.95 from BOAKYE APPIAH ABDUL-MUMIN on TELECEL CASH on 2025-08-29 at 08:47:14. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS1001.02. Ref: electricity
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. You have received GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) from (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Z][A-Za-z\s\.\-]+?) on TELECEL CASH on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\.(?:\s*Ref:\s*(?P<reference>.+))?

templates.description: Payment to a short-code merchant (e.g. 749000 Petra Securities, 735000 EXPRESSPAY)
templates.example: 0000012255152871 Confirmed. GHS5.05 paid to 735000 - EXPRESSPAY on 2026-03-03 at 10:41:30. Your new Telecel Cash balance is GHS456.68. You were charged GHS0.00. Your E-levy charge is GHS0.00. Reference: 90e6d0cdx2f1a.. Sendi k3k3!
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) paid to (?P<counterparty_phone>\d+) - (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Za-z][A-Za-z\s\.]+?) on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your new Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\. You were charged GHS(?P<fee>[\d.]+)\. Your E-levy charge is GHS(?P<e_levy>[\d.]+)\. Reference:\s*(?P<reference>.*?)\.

templates.description: Self-airtime top-up — no fee field, balance shown
templates.example: 0000011919258876 Confirmed. You bought GHS41.00 of airtime for 233507995144 on 2026-01-31 at 08:37:00. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS87.05.
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. You bought GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) of airtime for (?P<counterparty_phone>[\d]+) on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\.

templates.description: Airtime received from another user — confirmed via sender 555, no balance field
templates.example: Transaction ID: 0000012289051596 confirmed from 555. You have received airtime of GHS1.00 from 233507995144 - ALEX MARFO APPIAH on 2026-03-06 at 10:40:54.
templates.pattern: ^Transaction ID: (?P<tx_id>\d{16}) confirmed from 555\. You have received airtime of GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) from (?P<counterparty_phone>[\d]+) - (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Z][A-Z\s]+?) on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\.

templates.description: Cash withdrawal from a Telecel Cash agent
templates.example: 0000012028321647 Confirmed. You have withdrawn GHS40.00 from A25736 - FOEJOE ENTERPRISE on 2026-02-10 at 11:26:46. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS42.03.
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. You have withdrawn GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) from (?P<agent_code>[A-Z0-9]+) - (?P<counterparty_name>.+?) on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\.

templates.description: Transfer to a bank account (Stanbic, GCB, ABSA etc.) — fee breakdown included
templates.example: 0000012039324241 Confirmed. You have transferred GHS40.00 to STANBIC BANK ACCOUNT - 9040013268597 - ALEX MARFO APPIAH on 2026-02-11 at 12:27:52. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS1.53. You were charged GHS0.50 (Telecel Cash fee GHS0.50 + E-levy GHS0.00). Reference: Apple Music. Sendi k3k3!
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. You have transferred GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) to (?P<bank_name>[A-Z][A-Z\s]+ACCOUNT) - (?P<account_no>\d+) - (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Z][A-Z\s]+?) on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\. You were charged GHS(?P<fee>[\d.]+).*?Reference:\s*(?P<reference>.*?)\.

templates.description: Cash deposit made to wallet by a business or agent
templates.example: 0000012255758052 Confirmed. On 2026-03-03 at 11:44:15, a deposit of GHS100.00 was made to your account from FOEJOE ENTERPRISE . Your balance is GHS556.68. Sending money from Telecel Cash...
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. On (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}), a deposit of GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) was made to your account from (?P<counterparty_name>.+?)\s*\.\s*Your balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\.

templates.description: Inbound payment from a payment processor (e.g. EXPRESSPAY)
templates.example: 0000012269962269 confirmed. You have received GHS387.72 as payment from EXPRESSPAY on 2026-03-04 at 16:47:33. Your new Telecel Cash balance is GHS944.40.
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) confirmed\. You have received GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) as payment from (?P<counterparty_name>[A-Z][A-Z\s]+?) on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your new Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\.

templates.description: Ready Loan repayment — default charge, interest, or principal
templates.example: 0000012220022826 confirmed. You have paid your GHS6.60 Ready Loan default charge on 2026-02-28 at 10:40:29. Your new Telecel Cash balance is GHS46.73.
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) confirmed\. You have paid (?:your|off) GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) Ready Loan (?P<charge_type>.+?) (?:from CBG )?on (?P<date>\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}) at (?P<time>\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2})\. Your new Telecel Cash balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\.

templates.description: Interest earned on wallet balance — no tx_id, no date, short message. Balance label varies: 'Your new balance' or 'Your new Telecel Cash balance'
templates.example: Dear customer, you have received GHS0.86 from Telecel Cash as interest earned on your mobile money wallet for the period October 2025 to December 2025. Your new balance is GHS2.39.
templates.pattern: ^Dear customer, you have received GHS(?P<amount>[\d.]+) from Telecel Cash as interest earned.*?Your new (?:Telecel Cash )?balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\.

templates.description: Balance notification — sent after some transactions with no debit/credit info
templates.example: 0000012241711788 Confirmed. Your Telecel Cash wallet balance is GHS461.73 . Sending money from Telecel Cash to Telecel Cash remains FREE on the Telecel Play App.
templates.pattern: ^(?P<tx_id>\d{16}) Confirmed\. Your Telecel Cash wallet balance is GHS(?P<balance>[\d.]+)\s*\.
templates.notes: No amount or counterparty — parser should not attempt field extraction beyond balance
